title: E-commerce Dashbord
description: A fast, scalable admin panel for managing products, orders, and sales analytics. Built with React, Next.js, Firebase, and TailwindCSS.

title: Forbes Advisor Personal Finance
description: Implemented GA4 monetization tracking and KPI reporting, recovered 28% of Finserv traffic after Google updates through competitor analysis and content optimization across US, UK, and Canada, collaborated with the Dev team to improve Web Vitals, and achieved a 37% increase in annual revenue.

title: Kauverymeds Healthcare
description: Drove SEO and growth for a healthcare eCommerce site through content strategy, technical improvements, and backlinks, increasing traffic from 1K to 100K monthly via SEO and paid ads.
